signals.raw:
Kerala Assembly Elections Polling Completed on April 9, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Polling across all 140 constituencies in Kerala concluded successfully on April 9, 2026, in a single phase as scheduled, marking a key milestone with vote counting set for May 4, 2026[1][2][5].
